description: Tomorrow plan for Grade 4 classroom produces all required schema sections

input.teacher_reflection: Today's literacy block was rough. Ari struggled with the writing task — needed sentence starters we didn't have ready. Mika was off-task after lunch, took 10 minutes to settle. Jae finished early and was bored. EA was pulled for another class during the afternoon.
input.teacher_goal: Smoother transitions after lunch. Better prep for EAL writing support.
